name: Stronk Pi Setup
description: Public-ready setup, validation, and manifest verification surface for Stronk Pi.

interface.shortDescription: Install and validate Stronk Pi through the setup command.
interface.longDescription: Provides a public setup repository with manifest verification, offline validation, guardrail checks, and redacted diagnostics for Stronk Pi.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use stronkpi-setup validate to verify this Stronk Pi setup.
